name: orbitalpha-kiwoom-trading
description: Kiwoom domestic stock auto-trading engine (independent project)

scripts.live:test: cross-env AUTH_ENABLED=false AUTH_BYPASS_ROLE=trader APP_ENTRY_MODE=live LIVE_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED=false tsx src/app/main.ts
scripts.live:all: concurrently -k -n engine,monitor -c cyan,magenta "npm run live:test" "npm run monitor"
scripts.paper:all: concurrently -k -n paper,ui -c green,blue "cross-env APP_ENTRY_MODE=paper npm start" "npm run paper:ui"
scripts.pm2:stop: pm2 delete orbitalpha-kiwoom-live-engine orbitalpha-kiwoom-live-monitor orbitalpha-kiwoom-paper-engine orbitalpha-kiwoom-paper-dashboard
scripts.run:regular:test: cross-env FORCE_SESSION_PHASE=REGULAR PAPER_LOOP_MAX_TICKS=30 SIGNAL_CANDIDATE_MIN_SCORE=38 UNIVERSE_MIN_TURNOVER_KRW=500000000 EXPERIMENT_TAG=regular-test npm start
scripts.run:regular:strict: cross-env FORCE_SESSION_PHASE=REGULAR PAPER_LOOP_MAX_TICKS=30 SIGNAL_CANDIDATE_MIN_SCORE=45 UNIVERSE_MIN_TURNOVER_KRW=2000000000 EXPERIMENT_TAG=regular-strict npm start
scripts.run:regular:loose: cross-env FORCE_SESSION_PHASE=REGULAR PAPER_LOOP_MAX_TICKS=30 SIGNAL_CANDIDATE_MIN_SCORE=32 UNIVERSE_MIN_TURNOVER_KRW=200000000 EXPERIMENT_TAG=regular-loose npm start
